hook.summary: A man and a turkey fall as a bridge collapses, leading to a frantic block-building attempt.
hook.visual_action: A bridge breaks under a man and a turkey, followed by a hand placing colorful blocks to catch them.

scene_flow: A bridge collapses under a man and a turkey, sending them falling.
A hand begins stacking colorful blocks to create a platform for the falling characters.
The man lands on the growing tower while screaming in panic.
The tower eventually topples over, causing the man to fall again.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy physics-based puzzle challenges and slapstick humor.
